title: ochyrorchis oligoschista
intro: Ochyrorchis oligoschista is a species of orchid native to mountainous regions of the Himalayas and China. It is a type of epiphytic orchid, typically growing on tree trunks and branches. The medicinal properties of Ochyrorchis oligoschista include its use in traditional Chinese medicine to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues. However, I couldn't find specific information on its health benefits or herbal preparations.
